case_title: TURNER, CATHERINE AS GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR et al VS WALGREEN CO.

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY TURNER, CATHERINE AS GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR CALVONNIA KELLEY, A MINOR AS TO DEFENDANT WALGREEN CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-05-2007 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SIGNED SENT TO ANY AUTHORIZED AGENT FOR WALGREEN COMPANY CORP.
THE COURT APPOINTS CATHERINE TURNER AS GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR CALVONNIA KELLY, A MINOR.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TURNER, CATHERINE AS GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR CALVONNIA KELLEY, A MINOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WALGREEN CO. $750.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $835.00, THE COURT ON ITS OWN MOTION APPOINTS CATHERINE TURNER GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR CALVONNIA KELLY, A MINOR; PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS AMENDED TO INDICATE THE APPOINTMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
